title: Skosef
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Thatwasamazing.jpg]] |name=Skosef |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]][[Empire 3|''Empire'' 3]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Empire 1|''Empire'' 1]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Gray]][[Empire 2|''Empire'' 2]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Fair |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] **[[Anti-Sith conspiracy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Oh! Oh, you gotta be kidding me! That was amazing!|General Skosef, after a bombing attempt successfully destroyed Emperor Palpatine's shuttle|}} '''Skosef''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. By [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Skosef had joined a [[Anti-Sith conspiracy|plot]] led by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]] to overthrow the two [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lords]] leading the Empire, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. As a part of the plot, Skosef oversaw the [[Bomb/Legends|bombing]] of Palpatine's [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a]] [[Palpatine's shuttle (bombing)|shuttle]], which was destined for the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. Although Palpatine escaped the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle's]] demise, the blast [[Death/Legends|killed]] half of the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]] and many Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], a vital part of Trachta's plan. After Skosef was suspected by the Imperials of being connected with the bombing, Trachta assigned Skosef to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] Grand [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Bartam]], another member of their plot, as the conspirators turned against one another. Skosef successfully killed Bartam but was in turn killed by a [[Unidentified stormtrooper (Coruscant)|stormtrooper]] right after the assassination. ==Biography== {{Quote|Hey! Lower your weapon!|A stormtrooper, to Skosef, prior to the latter killing Bartam|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Skosef was a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] early during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Skosef joined a [[Anti-Sith conspiracy|plot]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] rulers of the Empire—[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]—by the later part of [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he escorted [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kadir (Moff)|Kadir]] of the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] to a meeting between the members of the conspiracy near [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Bartam]]'s [[Bartam's luxury apartment|luxury apartment]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Led by Imperial Grand Moff [[Trachta]], the conspirators—Grand Moff Bartam, [[Second officer/Legends|Second Officer]] [[Dezsetes]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Mathayus]]'', and the [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Gauer]], as well as Skosef and Kadir—discussed Trachta's plan on how to kill the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]]. The conspirators planned to engineer a need for more [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to guard the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on Coruscant, using an apparent assassination attempt against Palpatine to [[Death/Legends|kill]] a substantial portion of his palace security force. The attempt—the [[Bomb/Legends|bombing]] of Palpatine's [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a]] [[Palpatine's shuttle (bombing)|shuttle]]—was not intended to kill the Emperor, who the conspirators knew would survive the incident. The resulting losses among Palpatine's security force would allow [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] loyal to the members of the conspiracy to take their place and be in a position to kill the Emperor. Another squad of stormtroopers under Dezsetes's command would kill Vader in the [[Kether system]], where the planet [[Dargulli/Legends|Dargulli]] was located. During the meeting, Skosef was assigned to oversee the bombing of the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. [[File:Didyoubringmorebrandy.jpg|thumb|left|310px|Skosef prepares to kill Bartam.]] Prior to the departure of the shuttle on its trip to the Empire's [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], Skosef's stormtroopers placed a bomb inside the [[Starship/Legends|craft]] after they disguised it as a set of bottles in order to get it past the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guards]]. The bomb detonated before the shuttle left, obliterating the starship and killing the required amount of stormtroopers and Royal Guards; Skosef himself observed the blast from not far off. As the conspirators predicted, Palpatine indeed survived the explosion as he [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] the impending attack. When Palpatine was presented with stormtroopers, loyal to the conspirators, to replace those killed in the bombing, Trachta informed Skosef that the bombing had been traced back to the General, so Trachta assigned him a new part in the plan. While the members of the conspiracy struggled for power among one another as their plan to overthrow the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and ultimately become the rulers of the Empire neared fruition, Skosef sided with Trachta and tried to kill Grand Moff Bartam. Entering Bartam's luxury apartment unnoticed, Skosef shot the Grand Moff in the back with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] at close range. However, a [[Unidentified stormtrooper (Coruscant)|stormtrooper]] in the room observed the killing and opened fire on Skosef, killing the General. In the end, the only member of the conspiracy to survive was Gauer, as the rest were killed in the power struggles or died attempting to rid the Empire of the Sith, an effort that ultimately failed. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|That's just throwing away troopers. Don't we have a limited supply?''"
"''We just need a few for this. It's mostly his troopers dying.|Skosef and Grand Moff Bartam, discussing the bombing|}} As a part of the conspiracy, Skosef believed that he and his fellow conspirators could take control of the Empire from Emperor Palpatine and [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader. He initially expressed his doubts about the feasibility of using their limited number of stormtroopers to take out the Sith and at first questioned the bombing of Palpatine's shuttle, as it would waste some of their own troops. Trachta, however, eased his concerns by further explaining the plan. Skosef, upon observing the bombing, was amazed by it, and, after being ordered to kill Bartam as the conspirators turned against one another, he did so. The General was pale-skinned and had [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. ==Equipment== While serving as an Imperial, Skosef wore an [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]]. He also owned a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] pistol. ==Behind the scenes== Skosef first appeared in the [[Empire 1|first issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series, which was written by [[Scott Allie]], penciled by [[Ryan Benjamin]], and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[September 4]], [[2002]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54175/star_wars_empire_2002_1|text=Star Wars: Empire (2002) #1}} ==Appearances== *[[Empire 1|''Empire'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Empire 2|''Empire'' 2]] *[[Empire 3|''Empire'' 3]] ==Sources== *{{FactFile|135|BET 5-6|Imperial Betrayal}} *{{CSWECite|I||Bartam, Grand Moff}} *''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Skosef |pl=Skosef }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army generals of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
